caption: A large assembly of people is gathered in a tiered seating area, likely a legislative chamber. The attendees are predominantly men wearing traditional Indian attire, such as white kurtas and Nehru jackets, though some wear Western-style suits and a few women are dressed in colorful sarees. Most people are seated, while several individuals stand in the aisles or at the front of their rows. Throughout the sequence, the assembly is engaged in collective applause, with many individuals clapping their hands and looking toward a central point of focus. The lighting is bright and consistent across the room, and the seating consists of rows of wooden benches with light-colored cushions. There is no visible on-screen text or logos. The scene remains largely static in terms of composition, with the only changes being the subtle movements of the people as they continue to clap and shift in their seats.
